body_transformation: The rounded head retains its exact tufted hair curl pattern but now features molten gold strands with crimson ember sparks weaving through the brown tuft. Short stubby legs gain magma-cracked blackened scales along the lower limbs, while the compact body silhouette maintains its rounded shape with a cracked obsidian skin texture overlaid with glowing amber fissures. The curled tail tip's spiral shape remains intact, now edged with molten gold flame tips that emit faint smoke trails. Light brown and white coloration is replaced by burnt orange and charcoal black, with heat-haze distortion subtly warping the air around the body.
signature_feature: Tail tip: molten gold flame with ember sparks and smoke trails.
